query:
SELECT pd.id, pd.studentId, s.name as studentName, pd.amount, pd.dueDate, pd.status, pd.month, pd.year
FROM payment_dues pd
LEFT JOIN students s ON s.id = pd.studentId
ORDER BY pd.dueDate ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Dc4xXpDMUG8Xgr.root --database BmGzFY2mKvXZcrMsHaP5Au --execute
